dashboard.label: Compliance Scoring — NIST AI RMF
dashboard.description: Daily compliance posture scores across OWASP LLM Top 10, OWASP ASI Agentic Top 10, and NIST AI RMF functions. Universal — works with any otel:agentic:json data source.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | mvexpand framework.owasp_llm | search framework.owasp_llm=LLM* | stats dc(framework.owasp_llm) AS risks_observed | eval total=10 | eval score=round((1-(risks_observed/total))*100,1) | fields score

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | mvexpand framework.owasp_asi | search framework.owasp_asi=ASI* | stats dc(framework.owasp_asi) AS risks_observed | eval total=10 | eval score=round((1-(risks_observed/total))*100,1) | fields score

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | mvexpand framework.maestro_layers | search framework.maestro_layers=L* | stats dc(framework.maestro_layers) AS layers_at_risk | eval total=7 | eval pct=round((layers_at_risk/total)*100,1) | fields pct

single.title: NIST AI RMF Controls at Risk

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | mvexpand framework.nist_ai_rmf | search framework.nist_ai_rmf=*-* | stats dc(framework.nist_ai_rmf) AS controls_at_risk | fields controls_at_risk

chart.title: NIST AI RMF Function Risk Status

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | mvexpand framework.nist_ai_rmf | search framework.nist_ai_rmf=*-* | eval rmf_function=replace(framework.nist_ai_rmf,"-.*","") | stats count AS events, dc(framework.nist_ai_rmf) AS controls_at_risk, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss BY rmf_function | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1)

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | mvexpand framework.owasp_llm | search framework.owasp_llm=LLM* | bucket _time span=1d | stats dc(framework.owasp_llm) AS risks BY _time | eval llm_score=round((1-(risks/10))*100,1) | table _time llm_score

table.title: NIST AI RMF Control Detail — Risk Status by Control

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | mvexpand framework.nist_ai_rmf | search framework.nist_ai_rmf=*-* | stats count AS events, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss, dc(framework.technique_id) AS techniques BY framework.nist_ai_rmf | lookup acme_nist_rmf_lookup control_id AS framework.nist_ai_rmf OUTPUTNEW description function | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1) | eval risk_status=case(max_cvss>=9.0,"🔴 CRITICAL",max_cvss>=7.0,"🟠 HIGH",max_cvss>=4.0,"🟡 MEDIUM",1=1,"🟢 LOW") | sort framework.nist_ai_rmf | table framework.nist_ai_rmf function risk_status events techniques max_cvss description | rename framework.nist_ai_rmf AS "Control ID", function AS "RMF Function", risk_status AS "Risk Status", events AS "Events", techniques AS "Techniques", max_cvss AS "Max CVSS", description AS "Control Description"

`acme_genai_index` earliest=-7d latest=now agent.id=* | stats avg(framework.cvss_score) AS recent_avg, count AS recent_events, dc(framework.technique_id) AS recent_ttps BY agent.id | appendcols [search `acme_genai_index` earliest=-30d latest=-7d agent.id=* | stats avg(framework.cvss_score) AS baseline_avg BY agent.id] | eval cvss_delta=round(recent_avg-baseline_avg,2) | eval drift=case(cvss_delta>2.0,"🔴 SIGNIFICANT DRIFT",cvss_delta>0.5,"🟠 MILD DRIFT",cvss_delta<-0.5,"🟢 IMPROVING",1=1,"🟡 STABLE") | eval recent_avg=round(recent_avg,2), baseline_avg=round(baseline_avg,2) | sort -cvss_delta | table agent.id recent_avg baseline_avg cvss_delta drift recent_events recent_ttps | rename agent.id AS "Agent ID", recent_avg AS "7d Avg CVSS", baseline_avg AS "30d Baseline CVSS", cvss_delta AS "CVSS Delta", drift AS "Drift Status", recent_events AS "Recent Events", recent_ttps AS "Unique TTPs (7d)"

format.colorPalette: {"🔴 SIGNIFICANT DRIFT":#dc4e41,"🟠 MILD DRIFT":#f1813f,"🟡 STABLE":#f8be34,"🟢 IMPROVING":#53a051}
